hook: Your portfolio is not the only thing moving. Your emotions are too.

slides.text: Your portfolio is not the only thing moving. Your emotions are too.
slides.visual: Use assets/logos/logo.png exactly as supplied, topic title, and one clean visual cue.

slides.text: Your SIP is running, your portfolio is red for a week, and suddenly every social media post makes you doubt your plan.
slides.visual: Show a relatable young investor decision with simple labels and large mobile-readable text.

slides.text: FOMO is a behavior pattern that can push investors into rushed decisions.
slides.visual: Use a plain-English explainer card with one idea only.

slides.text: If your ₹10,000 SIP falls for a month, pause before stopping it. Ask whether your goal changed, or only your mood changed.
slides.visual: Use a practical example card with portfolio, SIP, risk, or Rs 10,000 decision framing.

slides.text: Use fOMO as a decision filter, not as a shortcut.
slides.visual: Use a strong one-line takeaway with accent highlight.

slides.text: Save this before chasing market trends.
slides.visual: Show CTA, disclaimer, tagline "Build Wealth. Not Debt.", and assets/logos/logo.png without editing the logo.

cta: Save this before chasing market trends.

compliance.disclaimer: Educational content only. This is not financial advice.
